name: agenc-store-templates
description: Deploy-your-own AgenC agent store: config-first Next.js templates + the shared store-core package (PLAN_2 Part C).
comment:overrides: LOCAL-ONLY: the AgenC packages are not yet published to npm. These overrides resolve every workspace's ^x.y.z range to the prebuilt tarballs in ../.local-tarballs so the monorepo installs + builds locally. Drop this block (and let the published versions resolve) once the packages publish — it is a build-aid, not part of what ships to a deployer.
author: Tetsuo AI
